content.problemStatement:
Given an infinite supply of Indian currency denominations {1, 2, 5, 10, 20, 50, 100, 200, 500, 2000} and a target amount NNN, find the minimum number of coins/notes needed to make the amount. Return the list of denominations used in descending order.


Input Format

The only line of input contains NNN - target amount


Output Format

Print space-separated integers representing the denominations used (in descending order)
